chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2161 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRIORITY CASE: 1. For hearing of CMA No.10417/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 22nd September 2023 Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, Asst. A.G. Sindh. Ms. Humaira, Advocate for SBCA. -*-*-*-*-*- Petitioner and his counsel are called absent, no intimation is received. Learned counsel for the SBCA has submitted report alongwith annexures, which is taken on record, however, submits that as per record, there is no violation found in respect of the subject property, as approval was given for ground plus two floors residential, which has been prima facie made as per approved building plan and there is no fresh construction observed at the site. It appears that for this reason, petitioner is not coming forward to pursue instant matter, which is accordingly disposed of alongwith listed application. J U D G E J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
